text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious hedgehog named Harold.

Harold pranced through the dew-kissed grass every morning, his little nose twitching at the scent of new experiences. One morning, he saw something shiny on the ground.

With agile limbs, Harold hoisted himself up onto a rock and brushed away shiny dust. To his surprise, beneath it was a tiny shiny object—a beautiful emerald gem.

Excitedly hopping around the rock, Harold examined his prize. It glowed warmly beneath his soft quills.

That evening, Harold polished his gem until it reflected the stars. He tucked it into his felt sock, thinking it his very own gemstone.

The next morning, Harold woke up to find his gem gone. Panicking, he searched for hours under the dew-shimmering ferns, but couldn't find it.

Finally, he remembered. He tucked it back under the rock and slept soundly. In the morning, it was still there.
